fixes.origin:
query = (
    "SELECT id, created_at, value, "
    "SUM(value) OVER (ORDER BY created_at ROWS BETWEEN " + days + " PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS s "
    "FROM metric_points"
)

cur.execute(query)
fixes.replacement:
n = int(days)
query = (
    "SELECT id, created_at, value, "
    f"SUM(value) OVER (ORDER BY created_at ROWS BETWEEN {n} PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS s "
    "FROM metric_points"
)

cur.execute(query)
